channel.title: DuckWare — Curated Cool Software
channel.description: A curation engine showcasing exceptional developer tools, open-source utilities, and beautiful software.

item.title: Mirarr: FOSS Movie Client
item.description: A clean, native, and platform-agnostic client designed to query and manage media watchlists. Runs natively on Android, iOS, Windows, and Linux with full privacy and zero telemetry tracking.

item.title: ffmpeg-webCLI: Local Video Editor
item.description: A browser-based video converter and operations dashboard powered by FFmpeg WebAssembly. Process operations (trim, rotate, crop, compress) entirely inside your browser with absolute privacy.

item.title: ZenNotes: Local Markdown Workspace
item.description: A keyboard-first notes manager built on local Markdown files. Integrates Vim motions, multi-runtime desktop/web builds, plain-text CSV databases, and a native Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.

item.title: Boneyard: Headless Skeleton Generator
item.description: An offline-first loader framework that automatically extracts pixel-perfect skeleton screens from your real UI layout at build time, with zero production runtime layout measurements.

item.title: Podroid: Rootless Linux VM for Android
item.description: A rootless Android app that boots a real Alpine Linux virtual machine — not a chroot workaround. Run Podman, Docker, and LXC containers, SSH in from a laptop, and launch GUI desktop apps from your phone.

item.title: portless: Named Local Dev URLs
item.description: A local dev proxy that swaps ephemeral port numbers for stable, memorable hostnames. HTTPS with HTTP/2, monorepo routing, and agent-friendly environment variables — zero config to start.

item.title: restic: Secure Incremental Backups
item.description: A single-binary backup program with client-side encryption, content-defined deduplication, and native support for S3, SFTP, B2, Azure, and dozens more backends via rclone.

item.title: Screenshot.rocks: Device Mockup Generator
item.description: An open-source web app that wraps raw screenshots in polished browser and mobile device frames. One-click browser extensions for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge, plus a self-hostable codebase.

item.title: httpSMS: Android SMS Gateway API
item.description: Turn your Android phone into a programmable SMS gateway. Send messages via a REST API, receive inbound texts through webhooks, and self-host the full stack when virtual numbers are not an option.

item.title: gallery-dl: Universal Gallery Downloader
item.description: A cross-platform CLI that downloads image galleries and collections from hundreds of hosting sites. Deep JSON configuration, programmable filenames, and cookie or OAuth authentication for private content.

item.title: omaTUNES: Native Wayland Music Player
item.description: A lightweight Rust music player for Hyprland and Omarchy rices. Local-library playback with live theme sync — no streaming services, no cloud dependencies, minimal resource footprint.

item.title: mapcn: React Map Components
item.description: Free, open-source map components for React built on MapLibre GL. shadcn/ui-compatible, theme-aware, and installable with a single CLI command — markers, routes, and controls included.

item.title: autobrr: Download Automation Hub
item.description: Modern torrent and Usenet automation with real-time IRC indexer monitoring. Filter-driven workflows that push releases to qBittorrent, Radarr, Sonarr, or watch folders the moment they drop.

item.title: rtk: LLM Token Compression Proxy
item.description: A single Rust binary that sits between your shell and coding agents, filtering command output before it hits the context window. Cuts token usage 60–90% on git, test, lint, and filesystem commands with under 10ms overhead.

item.title: Frame: Native FFmpeg GUI
item.description: A Rust desktop app for FFmpeg media conversion with a GPUI interface. Granular control over video, audio, subtitle, and metadata streams — backed by a reusable conversion core with probing, validation, and live progress parsing.

item.title: QR Code Styling: Branded QR Generator
item.description: A client-side JavaScript library for generating styled QR codes with embedded logos, custom dot shapes, and gradient fills. Export to canvas or SVG — no backend or third-party API required.

item.title: Ternlight: On-Device Embeddings
item.description: A WebAssembly embedding engine that ships model, tokenizer, and SIMD inference in a single 5–7 MB bundle. Embed text on CPU in milliseconds — semantic search with no API calls, no GPU, and no data leaving the device.

item.title: Tork: Terminal Torrent Client
item.description: A keyboard-driven Go CLI for searching torrent indexes, ranking swarms, and managing downloads from one TUI. Includes a built-in browser for official Linux ISOs and local health checks via tork doctor.

item.title: Deface: Video Face Anonymization
item.description: A Python CLI that detects faces in videos and photos, then applies blur, black boxes, or mosaic filters to each region automatically. Batch entire directories, tune detection thresholds, or run a live webcam demo.

item.title: Witr: Why Is This Running?
item.description: A Go CLI that traces processes, ports, containers, and file locks back to their causal chain. Includes an interactive TUI with live process, port, and container dashboards.

item.title: Mouzi: Downloads Folder Organizer
item.description: A privacy-first Tauri app that lives in the system tray and automatically sorts Downloads by customizable rules. 100% offline, ~5 MB RAM, with undo history and Google Takeout import.

item.title: Idle Fantasy: Offline Idle RPG
item.description: A free, open-source Android idle RPG with 23 skills, 20 dungeons, and 170+ quests. Train while the app is closed, collect loot on return — no internet, no account, no ads, and no stamina bar.

item.title: Pixel Snapper: AI Pixel Art Grid Fix
item.description: A Rust tool that snaps inconsistent AI-generated pixel art to a perfect grid with palette quantization. Available as CLI, WASM module, and web app for game asset pipelines.

item.title: UniClipboard: Encrypted Clipboard Sync
item.description: Real-time clipboard sync across Windows, macOS, and Linux — peer-to-peer with end-to-end encryption, encrypted relay fallback, and no cloud account.

item.title: yoinks: Terminal Video Downloader
item.description: Download video from YouTube, X, Instagram, TikTok, and 1,800+ sites through a full-screen Ink terminal UI. Paste a URL, pick a resolution or audio-only MP3, and save — no popups, no fake buttons, no shady redirects.

item.title: Face Looker: Cursor-Following Face Grids
item.description: Generate an AI gaze grid from a single portrait, then drop in a React hook that swaps frames so the face follows the cursor — portfolio headers, avatars, and interactive UI in one pipeline.

item.title: Runtipi: One-Click Homeserver
item.description: A Docker homeserver orchestrator with one-command setup and a web dashboard for one-click installs across a huge self-hosted app library.

item.title: Topgrade: Upgrade All the Things
item.description: One command that detects your package managers and upgrades everything — apt, brew, cargo, pip, winget, and dozens more — across local and remote machines.

item.title: kage: Shadow Sites Offline
item.description: Shadow any website for offline viewing: headless Chrome renders the finished page, every script is stripped, and the mirror packs into ZIM, a self-serving binary, or a native window.

item.title: croc: Secure Phrase Transfers
item.description: Securely send files between any two computers with a short code phrase — end-to-end encrypted, resumable, and free of port-forwarding.

item.title: Castor: Terminal-to-TV Streaming
item.description: Cast real web video streams to your TV from the terminal — extract, transcode, and DLNA-cast at full quality with optional burned-in Whisper subtitles.

item.title: jam.nvim: Spotify from Telescope
item.description: Search Spotify and control playback from a Telescope picker without leaving Neovim — live search, album-art previews, and PKCE auth.

item.title: YTSage: Desktop YouTube Downloader
item.description: A clean PySide6 desktop downloader for YouTube and yt-dlp sites — pick formats, extract audio, pull subtitles, strip SponsorBlock, and queue playlists without touching the CLI.

item.title: img2threejs: Image to Procedural Three.js
item.description: Rebuild a reference image as a code-only, quality-gated, animation-ready Three.js model — procedural reconstruction that spends tokens on judgment, not bookkeeping.
